channel.title: Insights — Never Ranked
channel.description: Clear thinking on AI search, AEO, schema, and the infrastructure that gets brands cited by machines.

item.title: What Is AEO (and Why It Replaced the Playbook You're Running)
item.dc:creator: Lance Roylo
item.description: AEO is the practice of getting cited by AI engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. Here is what changed and why your current SEO playbook stopped working.

item.title: How Long Does AEO Take to Show Results?
item.dc:creator: Lance Roylo
item.description: Ninety days. Here is exactly what happens in month one, two, and three of an AEO engagement, why it takes that long, and why anyone promising faster is lying.

item.title: Schema Markup for AI Search Engines: What Actually Matters
item.dc:creator: Lance Roylo
item.description: Most schema guides are written for Google rich snippets. AI models parse structured data differently. Here are the schema types that drive AI citations and the ones you can skip.
